creator: kkc@duckpond.dk
text:
(In reply to Allan Jude from comment #30)

Hi Allan,

I can confirm, that we are no longer experiencing this issue, neither in 11.3-RELEASE nor in 12.1-RELEASE (though 11.2-RELEASE and 12.0-RELEASE are still affected, I assume there's no plan to migrate this fix, for obvious reasons ;))

Thank you so much for your effort - you and everyone else who worked on this.
